categories.name: Maafushi + Budget-Luxury Resort
categories.description: 3 nights on the Maldives' most established guesthouse island, then 3 nights at a nearby South Male resort.

categories.name: Dhigurah + Premium Resort
categories.description: Time on Dhigurah for whale shark season, then a premium resort in Alifu Dhaalu with strong house reef access.

categories.name: Fulidhoo + Honeymoon Resort
categories.description: Two culture-rich nights on quiet Fulidhoo, then the rest of the trip at an adults-only water-villa resort.
